ai.title: AI recruiting startup Mercor hit by cyberattack; Meta halts collaboration
ai.description: As per media reports, Mercor was among thousands of firms affected by the compromise of LiteLLM. Even as Mercor has claimed that the malicious code was detected and removed, the breach drew attention because LiteLLM is widely used. LiteLLM has since strengthened its compliance measures, switching from the controversy-hit compliance startup Delve to Vanta for certifications.
